name: learnings-discipline-marketplace
description: Single-plugin marketplace hosting learnings-discipline — the CLAUDE.md + LEARNINGS.md documentation discipline packaged as a Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: learnings-discipline
plugins.description: Auto-detects when to scaffold institutional memory, capture failures and wins, and brainstorm complex tasks. Ships skills, hooks, an MCP server with 8 tools, 3 subagents, and 5 project-type template variants.
